hotels.description_en:
Spacious Accommodation: CdR Casa do Rei in Lajes das Flores offers a spacious apartment with two bedrooms and a bathroom. The ground-floor unit features a private entrance and inner courtyard views.
Outdoor Spaces: Guests can relax in the garden or on the terrace, enjoying garden views. The terrace is equipped with outdoor furniture, perfect for alfresco dining.
Modern Amenities: The apartment includes a kitchenette with a coffee machine, microwave, and oven. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. Additional amenities include a work desk, TV, and free toiletries.
Convenient Location: Praia da Calheta is a 19-minute walk away. Flores Airport is 17 km from the property. Reception staff speak German, English, and Portuguese.

Spacious Accommodation: Ocidente House 2 in Santa Cruz das Flores offers a spacious apartment with three bedrooms and one bathroom. The terrace provides sea, lake, and mountain views, complemented by a patio and outdoor furniture.
